quotes.text: The best time to refactor is when the code is fresh in your mind. The worst time is when you're debugging a production incident at 3 AM.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start a business was yesterday. The second best time is now. The worst time is 'when the market is ready.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start building an audience is before you need one.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to refactor is when nobody is watching. The second best time is between features. The worst time is during an incident.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now. Same goes for building your business.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start a business is when you're young and have nothing to lose. The second best time is when you're experienced and have something to build with.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start building a brand is before you have a product. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start an indie business is before you need the money. Build while you have a safety net.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to upsell is when the customer is already getting value. Not before.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to learn from failure is immediately after it happens. Not years later.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build an indie business is before you need the money. Build while you have a safety net.
quotes.author: based
